decisions.standardDanielPolicy: Keep standard Daniel and Greek Daniel separated. Do not import Greek-addition rows into standard Daniel as a NABRE repair.
decisions.daniel3Policy: Historical NABRE source contains extended Daniel 3 rows; active standard Daniel remains Daniel 3:1-30 only.
decisions.daniel13_14Policy: Historical NABRE source contains Daniel 13 and 14 rows; active standard Daniel has no Daniel 13 or Daniel 14 rows. These belong under separate Greek/deuterocanonical governance, not standard Daniel row repair.
decisions.daniel11Policy: Historical NABRE source file has no Daniel 11 rows. Daniel 11:1-45 must remain classified and must not be synthesized from other translations.
decisions.daniel5_31Policy: Daniel 5:31 remains classified pending separate review; no safe NABRE source mapping was identified.
decisions.drbPolicy: DRB raw Daniel is not a source for NABRE overlays.
